creator: n_hibma@webweaving.org
text:
Please subscribe to the mailing list questions@freebsd.org for answers
to these questions. To subscribe to mailing list please send a message
to 

	majordomo@freebsd.org

with no subject and the only text in the body of the message is

	subscribe freebsd-questions schroder@briefcase.com


Hope this helps.

Nick
--
n_hibma@webweaving.org
n_hibma@freebsd.org                                          USB project
http://www.etla.net/~n_hibma/
